semantic_model_notes: NEGATION_TAGS is a provisional engine-local semantic opposition table and should be promoted to a documented ontology/taxonomy before independent conformance claims.
Positive pattern contribution is capped by tag-group to reduce duplicate-pattern stuffing and low-evidence spam.
